XMLDB.COMMENT: DB schema for local_aigrader plugin (AI Grader Pro).

TABLE.NAME: local_aigrader_assign
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-assignment configuration: which assignments have AI Grader Pro enabled, evaluation criteria written by the teacher, and per-assignment overrides for model/language.

FIELD.NAME: assignid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to {assign}.id. Unique: one config per assignment.

FIELD.NAME: enabled
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 = AI Grader Pro active on this assignment.

FIELD.NAME: criteria_text
FIELD.COMMENT: Evaluation criteria written by the teacher in natural language. Required to enable.

FIELD.NAME: source
FIELD.COMMENT: Origin of criteria_text: manual | rubric_imported | rubric_edited

FIELD.NAME: model_override
FIELD.COMMENT: If set, overrides the AI Subsystem default model for this assignment.

FIELD.NAME: language_override
FIELD.COMMENT: If set, overrides course language for feedback (ISO code, e.g. es, en, pt).

FIELD.NAME: usermodified
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to {user}.id of teacher who last edited config.

TABLE.NAME: local_aigrader_submission
TABLE.COMMENT: Tracks AI grading proposal state per assignment submission. The proposal lives here in 'ai_proposed' state until the teacher reviews and approves, at which point the grade is migrated to {assign_grades}. Nothing in this table is ever shown to the student.

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to {assign_submission}.id

FIELD.NAME: assignid
FIELD.COMMENT: Denormalised FK to {assign}.id for fast filtering.

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: Denormalised FK to {course}.id.

FIELD.NAME: studentid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to {user}.id of the student whose submission this is.

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: State machine: pending_ai | ai_proposed | teacher_reviewed | published | error | unsupported_format

FIELD.NAME: proposed_grade
FIELD.COMMENT: Grade proposed by the LLM (0-100 scale by default).

FIELD.NAME: proposed_feedback
FIELD.COMMENT: Full LLM response as JSON: criterion_scores, strengths, improvements, justification.

FIELD.NAME: final_grade
FIELD.COMMENT: Grade after teacher review. May equal proposed_grade if teacher just approved.

FIELD.NAME: final_feedback
FIELD.COMMENT: Feedback published to student. May equal proposed_feedback if teacher just approved.

FIELD.NAME: final_grader
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to {user}.id of the teacher who approved/published.

FIELD.NAME: error_message
FIELD.COMMENT: If status=error or unsupported_format, the human-readable reason.

FIELD.NAME: timeprocessed
FIELD.COMMENT: When the LLM call completed and status became ai_proposed (or error).

FIELD.NAME: timepublished
FIELD.COMMENT: When teacher approved and grade was migrated to {assign_grades}.

KEY.NAME: submissionid_unique
KEY.COMMENT: One AI grading record per submission.

INDEX.NAME: status_ix
INDEX.COMMENT: Fast filtering for adhoc task queue.

TABLE.NAME: local_aigrader_log
TABLE.COMMENT: Append-only audit log of every AI grading action: prompts sent to the LLM, responses received, teacher edits applied. Required by GDPR (data subject right of access) and AI Act (high-risk system record-keeping).

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to {assign_submission}.id

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to {user}.id of teacher who triggered the action.

FIELD.NAME: studentid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to {user}.id of the student whose submission was processed.

FIELD.NAME: action
FIELD.COMMENT: grade | regrade | edit | approve | reject

FIELD.NAME: llm_provider
FIELD.COMMENT: Moodle AI Subsystem provider name (openai, azureai, ...).

FIELD.NAME: llm_model
FIELD.COMMENT: Model identifier as configured in the provider.

FIELD.NAME: prompt_hash
FIELD.COMMENT: SHA-256 of the full prompt for deduplication and cache lookups.

FIELD.NAME: prompt_text
FIELD.COMMENT: Full prompt sent to the LLM. v0.2 will encrypt at-rest.

FIELD.NAME: response_json
FIELD.COMMENT: Raw response from the LLM (parsed JSON object as string).

FIELD.NAME: final_grade
FIELD.COMMENT: If action=approve or edit, the grade actually published.

FIELD.NAME: teacher_edits
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON diff between proposed and final (only present for action=edit).

FIELD.NAME: submission_format
FIELD.COMMENT: onlinetext | docx | code | zip | ipynb | mixed | unsupported
